title: enckea unguiculata
intro: Enckea unguiculata, also known as the fingered Enckea, is a plant species in the family Gesneriaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain and swelling. Enckea unguiculata can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also sometimes used in traditional cooking.
